role: Staff Member — ICPC Latin America Championship 2025
description: Staff member at the 2025 ICPC Latin America Championship, supporting the organization and on-site operation of one of the world's most prestigious collegiate programming contests.
Designed and led a hands-on Python workshop at SEMCOMP 23, one of the largest student-run computing events in Salvador.

role: Teaching Assistant — Data Structures & Algorithms I
description: Mentored undergraduate students in introduction to object-oriented programming, algorithm complexity analysis, sorting algorithms and data structures. Assisted the professor by reviewing assessments and providing one-on-one support to students.
